mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` (order_no, user_id, merchant_id, address_id, total_amount, status, payment_method, payment_time, shipping_address, remark, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{orderNo}, #{userId}, #{merchantId}, #{addressId}, #{totalAmount}, #{status}, #{paymentMethod}, #{paymentTime}, #{shippingAddress}, #{remark}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM `order` WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET status = #{status}, payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
